title: Kingfisher Interior Brick & Dust Sealer- Matt Finish (1 Litre) | Dust Control and Surface Protection for Internal Brick Work, Porous Stone, Mortar Joints & Concrete
features: BINDS SURFACE DUST & PARTICLES – This breathable interior brick sealer locks down loose dust from clay bricks, stone, mortar joints, breeze blocks, and more—reducing airborne particles and keeping your home or workspace cleaner and safer.

NATURAL, MATT FINISH – Ideal for exposed internal masonry, this interior brick sealer dries to a subtle matt finish that preserves the natural look of brick and stone while offering reliable stain resistance and optional enhanced protection with a second coat.

BREATHABLE & SOLVENT FREE – Vapour-permeable and solvent-free, this sealer prevents moisture buildup and is safe for enclosed spaces. Perfect as a fireplace sealer, it helps bind dust while allowing walls to breathe—great for older homes or rustic finishes.

VERSATILE & EASY TO APPLY– Whether used as a natural stone sealer or dust suppressant on masonry, it can be brushed, rolled, or low-pressure sprayed. Use one coat for light protection or two for increased stain resistance and a slight sheen.

BUILT FOR CUMBRIA. MADE FOR EVERYWHERE – Developed in the unforgiving conditions of the Lake District, Kingfisher products are built to perform in the harshest environments. With over 30 years of heritage, we’re known for high-performance solutions trusted by professionals.

COVERAGE 5–6 m²/litre – Highly economical and efficient: 1 litre covers approx. 5–6 m² of brickwork depending on surface porosity and application method, ensuring excellent value for both small DIY jobs and larger projects.
